tests.integration.test_api::test_health_.description: Health check responds successfully without requiring authentication.

tests.integration.test_api::test_auth_fl.description: Login creates an authenticated session and the current-user endpoint returns the signed-in account.

tests.integration.test_api::test_admin_c.description: Admin users can manage local accounts while standard users are blocked from admin-only routes.

tests.integration.test_api::test_threads.description: Thread history stores multiple turns and remains searchable by prompt content.

tests.integration.test_api::test_api_rej.description: Creating a sixth thread is rejected before persistence with the configured per-user chat limit.
Submitting a fourth saved task flow in one chat is rejected before task execution begins.
The streaming task endpoint rejects a fourth task flow before opening an SSE execution stream.

tests.integration.test_api::test_thread_.description: Deleting a thread removes its stored turns and hides it from history.

tests.integration.test_api::test_api_sup.description: The task API supports up to two subtasks in one request and returns combined multi-tool output.

tests.integration.test_api::test_api_acc.description: Quoted and separators inside one text-transform request do not trigger false multi-subtask splitting in the API.

tests.integration.test_api::test_api_ret.description: An explicit unsupported target currency returns a handled failure with CURRENCY_NOT_SUPPORTED details instead of silently falling back to the source currency.

tests.integration.test_api::test_api_rou.description: A transaction prompt that includes a currency amount still routes to the transaction categorizer rather than the currency converter.

tests.integration.test_api::test_api_rej.description: Requests containing more than two subtasks are rejected with a validation error.
The API still rejects a real three-subtask request even when one quoted text segment contains the word and.

tests.integration.test_api::test_api_ret.description: Unsupported requests are returned as handled task results instead of crashing the API.

tests.integration.test_api::test_api_str.description: Streaming execution emits ordered trace events and finishes with the persisted thread payload.
Streaming execution returns both categorization and conversion results for the combined finance pipeline.
Streaming execution returns a completed unsupported-task turn rather than failing the stream.
Streaming execution surfaces retry scheduling before completing successfully after a transient tool failure.

tests.unit.test_agent::test_interpreter_.description: Interpreter routing selects the correct primary tool for each supported request family.
Interpreter recognizes the documented natural-language synonym prompts for text, calculator, weather, currency, and transaction tools.
Interpreter preserves an explicit unsupported target currency so the converter can surface a validation error.
Interpreter keeps the same-currency fallback only when no target currency is provided in the prompt.
Interpreter keeps transaction prompts with embedded currency amounts on the categorization tool unless explicit conversion intent is present.
Interpreter builds the chained categorization-to-currency plan for supported finance prompts.
Interpreter splits supported natural-language requests into two independent tool steps.
Interpreter accepts unquoted text transforms inside a two-subtask request.
Interpreter keeps quoted and separators inside one text-transform request instead of splitting them into multiple subtasks.
Interpreter treats single-quoted text as one payload and does not split on and inside the quoted segment.
Interpreter does not treat apostrophes inside words as quote delimiters when counting subtasks.
Interpreter still enforces the two-subtask limit when one segment contains quoted and but there are three real subtasks overall.
Interpreter enforces the maximum of two subtasks per request.

tests.unit.test_agent::test_controller_c.description: Controller combines multiple tool outputs into one ordered final response payload.
Controller treats count-the-word prompts as supported text word-count requests and returns the expected completed output.
Controller returns both categorization and conversion summaries in numbered order for the supported finance pipeline.

tests.unit.test_agent::test_controller_r.description: Controller returns a handled failed turn with supported currency details when the prompt names an unsupported explicit target currency.
Controller converts unsupported requests into handled thread turns with response assembly steps.
Controller keeps substring or occurrence-count wording unsupported and returns a handled unsupported-task turn.
Controller retries a retryable tool failure once and records the retry step in the trace.
Controller returns a handled failed turn when a retryable tool error still fails after the retry limit.

tests.unit.test_agent::test_repository_s.description: Repository initialization seeds only the documented bootstrap admin account.

tests.unit.test_agent::test_thread_persi.description: Repository persists masked turn content and auto-generates thread titles from the first task.

tests.unit.test_agent::test_repository_e.description: Repository rejects new users whose passwords do not meet the documented policy.
Repository enforces the configured maximum number of admin and standard user accounts.
Repository rejects a sixth chat thread for the same user.
Repository rejects a fourth saved task flow inside the same chat thread.

tests.unit.test_tools::test_text_process.description: Text processor returns uppercase output for supported requests.
Text processor rejects requests that omit the required text target.

tests.unit.test_tools::test_calculator_p.description: Calculator preserves arithmetic precedence and parentheses order.

tests.unit.test_tools::test_weather_city.description: Weather tool matches supported cities without case sensitivity.

tests.unit.test_tools::test_weather_reje.description: Weather tool returns a validation error when the city is outside the supported mock list.

tests.unit.test_tools::test_currency_con.description: Currency converter returns the expected converted amount for supported codes.

tests.unit.test_tools::test_transaction_.description: Transaction categorizer matches merchant keywords to the expected spending category.
Transaction categorizer falls back to the generic other category when no keyword matches.

tests.unit.test_safety::test_safety_guar.description: Safety guard rejects input longer than the documented 250 character limit.
Safety guard accepts input that is exactly at the documented character limit.
